# SceneSmith Studio

> The AI-powered writer's room for screenplays, novels, worldbuilding, comedy, and audio storytelling — from first spark to final pitch.

SceneSmith Studio is one studio for five storytelling crafts. Writers use the Writer's Desk for industry-standard formatting, the Casting Wall for character bibles, the Scene Board for outlines, the Shot Wall for visual planning, the Rehearsal Room for AI table reads, and the Producer Room for pitch packaging.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of the writer's toolbox and the five storytelling pillars.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for SceneSmith Studio.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create a SceneSmith Studio account.
